embodies PANCHA BHUTAS., and the fumes thereof have
CHEMICAL EFFECT. (BOTH IN ABSTRACT AND IN NON-
ABSTRACT FORMS).
The kind of performance of holy offerings to the Sacred fire
and thereby marching towards divinity helps people not only to
enjoy divine blessings, but also to get concentration of mind which
helps one to cultivate good habits.
EVIL SPIRITS
When there is the planetary combination of Moon, Dragon
Head and Venus, effects of evil spirits can prevail. This causes

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY II
to the native a sort of mental aberration, hallucination, The native
will not be knowing what he is doing. His mind becomes standstill.
All the above effects put together is called insanity.
The other planetary combinations which cause similar
effects are that of Mercury, Mars, and Dragon Head and that of
Mars, Jupiter and Dragon Head. This kind of effect operates on
the mental faculties of the affected natives more vigourously under
